content: What was your very first impression of me when we first met?
If we could travel anywhere in the world tomorrow, where would we go?
Where do you see us living in five years?
What is a minor habit of mine that you secretly find endearing?
What has been the most challenging moment we've faced together, and how did it strengthen us?
If we were characters in a movie, which couple would we be?
What is one dream you hope we accomplish together in the next year?
What song always makes you think of me?
What is one thing about our relationship that you hope never changes?
If we could only eat one cuisine together for the rest of our lives, what would it be?
What is your favorite memory of us from last winter?
What is a life goal of yours that I can help you achieve?
What does a perfect day together look like from morning to night?
How do you think we have both grown since we first got together?
Which of my traits do you think would make me a good parent or mentor?
If we won the lottery tomorrow, what is the first thing we would buy?
What is your favorite physical feature of mine?
What is a secret dream of yours that you've never told anyone else?
What is your favorite way to receive affection from me?
If you could change one thing about our current routine, what would it be?
What is the funniest thing that has happened to us on a date?
How do you define 'home' and does it relate to us?
What is one adventure you want to go on before the end of the year?
When did you first realize you were falling in love with me?
What is a custom/tradition you want us to start doing every year?
What is a book, movie, or album that changed your perspective on relationships?
What is the best piece of advice you've ever received about love?
If we had a free weekend with no responsibilities, how would we spend it?
What is a meal that instantly reminds you of a special moment between us?
What is one personality trait of mine that balances yours out?
Where is the most romantic place we've ever visited together?
If our relationship had a slogan, what would it be?
What is a skill or hobby you would love for us to learn together?
What are you most proud of in our relationship?
What is your favorite way to wind down together after a busy day?
What is one thing I do that instantly makes you feel safe and loved?
If we could guest-star on any TV show together, which one would it be?
What is a value you hope we pass on to future generations?
What is your favorite picture of us and why?
What is one career goal you hope to achieve, and how can I support you?
If we were to open a business together, what kind of business would it be?
What was the exact moment you felt our connection click?
What is one question you have been meaning to ask me but haven't?
What is your favorite season to experience together and why?
Where is the absolute best spot in our home to relax together?
What is a personal fear you've overcome with my help?
What is the most thoughtful gift I've ever given you?
If we could adopt any pet (real or imaginary), what would it be?
What is a future milestone of ours that you are most excited about?
What is your favorite scent that reminds you of me or our space?
How do you feel our communication has improved over time?
What is one thing we do together that always makes you laugh out loud?
What is a promise you want to make to me for our future?
What is the nicest thing I've said to you recently?
How do you think we handle conflicts, and how can we do better?
If we could teleport to any restaurant in the world for dinner tonight, where would it be?
What is one lesson our relationship has taught you about yourself?
What is your favorite memory of us from last summer?
What are three words you would use to describe our future together?
If we were stranded on a desert island, what role would each of us take?
What is one little way I show my love for you that you appreciate?
What does vulnerability mean to you, and how do we practice it?
What is a bucket list trip you want us to plan in the next two years?
What is your absolute favorite date night we've ever had?
What is a joint project you'd like us to build or work on?
If we could have any superpower together, what would we choose?
What is the most comforting thing I can do for you when you are stressed?
How do you hope our relationship changes as we grow older?
What is a childhood memory of yours that you wish I could have experienced with you?
What is your favorite breakfast to make or eat together on weekends?
What is a compliment from me that you'll never forget?
What is one area in our relationship where you feel we are most aligned?
If we could design our dream house, what is one non-negotiable room it must have?
What is one quirky habit of ours as a couple that others might find weird?
When do you feel closest to me?
What is a hard truth you've realized about love that we navigate together?
What is a custom tradition you want us to start doing during the holidays?
If we were in a band, what instruments would we play and who would be the lead singer?
What is your favorite memory of us doing absolutely nothing together?
What is a goal we've already achieved that you are most proud of?
What is one way we can bring more playfulness into our daily lives?
What is one fear you have about our future, and how can we address it together?
What is a creative hobby you'd like us to try together?
What is your favorite memory of us in the kitchen?
What is a value you want our relationship to stand for?
If we could freeze time for a day, how would we spend those 24 hours?
What is a dream retirement look like to you?
What is the best compliment you can give to our relationship?
What is your favorite clothing item of mine?
What is one thing you've learned about relationships by watching my parents or family?
If we were an animal pair, what animal would we be?
What is a small gesture of appreciation you'd like us to do more often?
What is the next big goal you hope we check off our list?
What is your favorite way to wake up next to me?
How do you think our relationship makes you a better person?
If we could build a themed room in our future house, what theme would it be?

What is your favorite memory of us traveling or on a road trip?
What is the most beautiful thing about the way we support each other?
